name: MediaGetPropertyRatio
title: MediaGetPropertyRatio
syntax: long MediaGetPropertyRatio(dword objHandle, char propertyName[], dword& numerator, dword& denominator);
description: Retrieves a property whose value is a ratio. Properties can be retrieved on an object specific basis for a media type object (e.g. returned by MediaGetMediaType).

parameters.name: propertyName
parameters.description: Name of the property to be retrieved. For a list of properties that can be retrieved by this function see Media Properties and Major Media Types / Subtypes.

parameters.name: numerator
parameters.description: Receives the numerator of the ratio.

parameters.name: denominator
parameters.description: Receives the denominator of the ratio.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
